ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "public_school_rating" REAL /* Average rating of public schools in the neighborhood */,
  "park_area" REAL /* Total area of parks in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the town */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the town */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the town */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the town */,
  "public_school_rating" REAL /* Average rating of public schools in the town */,
  "park_area" REAL /* Total area of parks in the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, survey) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the data was collected */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "RM" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "AGE" REAL /* Age of the houses */,
  "DIS" REAL /* Distance to employment centers */,
  "RAD" REAL /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "TAX" REAL /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "public_school_rating" REAL /* Average rating of public schools in the area */,
  "park_area" REAL /* Total area of parks in the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the area */,
  "property_value_change" REAL /* Change in property value over the past year */,
  "foreclosure_rate" REAL /* Foreclosure rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "analysis_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy or confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis that produced the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to create the visualization (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy or confidence level of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the security event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login failure, unauthorized access) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the security event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the security event */,
  "event_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the security event occurred */,
  "event_device" TEXT /* Device used during the security event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location from which the security event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
